title: Amethyst Cursor - Cursors Extended RP
description: A special resource pack for the "Cursors Extended" mod, which changes the cursor palette to the amethyst palette
body:
The resource pack replaces all cursor textures with a cursor with an amethyst palette. No more information is needed. I really don't know what else to write here, so I'll just fill it out with this sentence.

THE Cursors Extended MOD IS REQUIRED.

![how it looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c141df8ae6200bcb7b498ab37e8da7d3be934c2.png)
